---
title: "DMEA"
author: "Belinda B. Garana"
date: "2025-01-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# load packages
if (require(panSEA)) {
  if (!require("devtools", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("devtools")
  
  devtools::install_github("BelindaBGarana/panSEA", "add-tie-handling")
}

library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2);library(synapser);library(panSEA)
library(data.table)
source("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PNNL-CompBio/MPNST_Chr8/refs/heads/main/panSEA_helper_20240913.R")

# load helper functions
# adapted from: https://github.com/PNNL-CompBio/coderdata/blob/main/build/lincs/05-LINCS_perturbations.R
build_L1000 <- function() {
  options(timeout = 300)

  # identify URLs
  #basename="https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE101406"
  L1000 <- 'https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/series/GSE101nnn/GSE101406/suppl/GSE101406%5FBroad%5FLINCS%5FL1000%5FLevel4%5FZSPCINF%5Fmlr12k%5Fn1667x12328.gctx.gz'
  L1000.genes <- 'https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/series/GSE101nnn/GSE101406/suppl/GSE101406%5FBroad%5FLINCS%5FL1000%5Fgene%5Finfo.txt.gz'
  L1000.inst <- 'https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/series/GSE101nnn/GSE101406/suppl/GSE101406%5FBroad%5FLINCS%5FL1000%5Finst%5Finfo.txt.gz'

  # download source sample & perturbation info
  L1000.genes.info <- readr::read_delim(L1000.genes, "\t") # pr_gene_symbol, pr_gene_id
  L1000.inst.info <- readr::read_delim(L1000.inst, "\t") # pert_iname; pert_type = "trt_cp" if drug, "ctl_vehicle" if DMSO; cell_id
  L1000.inst.info <- L1000.inst.info[L1000.inst.info$pert_type == "trt_cp", ] # only keep drug treatments (remove DMSO controls)

  # download L1000 data
  if (file.exists("L1000.gctx")) {
    L1000.df <- cmapR::parse_gctx("L1000.gctx")
  } else {
   res<-download.file(L1000,'L1000.gctx.gz', mode="wb")
  L1000.df<-cmapR::parse_gctx(R.utils::gunzip("L1000.gctx.gz")) 
  }

  # put data into long format
  L1000.long <- cmapR::melt_gct(L1000.df)
  colnames(L1000.long) <- c("inst_id", "pr_gene_id", "data_value")
  L1000.long$pr_gene_id <- as.numeric(L1000.long$pr_gene_id)

  # join with L1000.gene.info based on pr_gene_id;
  # L1000.inst.info based on inst_id;
  # keep only cell_id, pert_type, pert_iname, gene_symbol, data_value
  L1000.full <- L1000.long |>
    dplyr::left_join(L1000.genes.info) |>
    dplyr::left_join(L1000.inst.info) |>
    dplyr::select(cell_id,pert_type,pert_iname,pr_gene_symbol,data_value)|>
    dplyr::distinct()
  L1000.long <- NULL # save space

  # add relevant columns
  L1000.full <- na.omit(L1000.full)
  colnames(L1000.full)[1] <- "other_names" # match samples column name
  colnames(L1000.full)[4] <- "gene_symbol" # match genes column name
  colnames(L1000.full)[3] <- "chem_name"
  L1000.full$data_type <- "transcriptomics"
  L1000.full$source <- "Broad"
  L1000.full$study <- "LINCS"
  L1000.full$perturbation_type <- "drug" # all entries have pert_type="trt_cp"
  return(L1000.full)
}
```

## load inputs
```{r load inputs, echo = FALSE}
synapser::synLogin()
# RNA-seq data with HGNC symbols (update once batch-corrected)
diffexp <- read.csv(synapser::synGet('syn64397743')$path) # 646576 genes
degs <- na.omit(diffexp[diffexp$padj <= 0.05,]) # 73933 genes
if (any(degs$drug=="Ribociblib")) {
 degs[degs$drug=="Ribociblib",]$drug <- "Ribociclib" 
}

# reduce to overlapping genes, check for overlapping drugsL1000.genes <- 'https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/series/GSE101nnn/GSE101406/suppl/GSE101406%5FBroad%5FLINCS%5FL1000%5Fgene%5Finfo.txt.gz'
L1000.genes <- 'https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/series/GSE101nnn/GSE101406/suppl/GSE101406%5FBroad%5FLINCS%5FL1000%5Fgene%5Finfo.txt.gz'
L1000.genes.info <- readr::read_delim(L1000.genes, "\t") # pr_gene_symbol, pr_gene_id
degs.L1000 <- degs[degs$hgnc_symbol %in% L1000.genes.info$pr_gene_symbol,] # 46337 / 62734
```

## produce GMTs
```{r produce txt files, echo = FALSE}
drug.info <- list("CDK inhibitor" = c("Palbociclib","Ribociclib"),
                  "Chemotherapy" = "Trabectidin",
                  "DNA alkylating agent" = "Ifosfamide",
                  "DNA methyltransferase inhibitor" = "Decitabine",
                  "HDAC inhibitor" = "Vorinostat",
                  "MEK inhibitor" = c("Mirdametinib","Selumetinib","Trametinib"),
                  "MET inhibitor" = "Capmatinib",
                  "PARP inhibitor" = "Olaparib",
                  "SHP2 inhibitor" = c("RMC4630","TNO155"),
                  "topoisomerase inhibitor" = "Doxorubicin",
                  "TEADi" = "Verteporfin")
# compare treated vs. untreated
# DMEA NES < 0: drug mechanisms which may be more toxic to treated samples
timepoints <- na.omit(unique(degs.L1000$Timepoint))
base.path <- getwd()
dmea.path <- file.path(base.path, "DMEA_Cmap_L1000")
dir.create("DMEA_Cmap_L1000")

all.drug.degs <- data.frame()
for (i in timepoints) {
  # filter for time
  time.deg <- degs.L1000[degs.L1000$Timepoint == i,]
  
  # prep inputs for each drug
  drug.degs <- list()
  #expr <- list()
  all.drugs <- na.omit(unique(time.deg$Drug))
  for (j in all.drugs) {
    temp.deg <- na.omit(dplyr::distinct(
      time.deg[time.deg$Drug == j,c("hgnc_symbol","log2FoldChange")]))
    colnames(temp.deg) <- c("Gene", "Log2FC")
    if (any(duplicated(temp.deg$Gene))) {
      temp.deg <- plyr::ddply(temp.deg, .(Gene), summarize,
                              Log2FC = mean(Log2FC))
    }
    #temp.deg <- temp.deg[temp.deg$Gene %in% colnames(ccle)[2:ncol(ccle)],]
    if (nrow(temp.deg) > 0) {
      up.deg <- temp.deg[temp.deg$Log2FC>0,] %>% slice_max(Log2FC, n=150, with_ties=FALSE)
      dn.deg <- temp.deg[temp.deg$Log2FC<0,] %>% slice_min(Log2FC, n=150, with_ties=FALSE)
      if (nrow(up.deg) >= 10 & nrow(dn.deg) >= 10) {
       drug.degs[[j]] <- rbind(up.deg, dn.deg) 
      }
    }
  }
  drug.degs.df <- data.table::rbindlist(drug.degs, use.names=TRUE, idcol="DrugTreatment")
  drug.degs.df$Time <- substr(i,1,nchar(i)-1)
  all.drug.degs <- rbind(all.drug.degs, drug.degs.df)
} 
setwd(dmea.path)
write.csv(all.drug.degs,paste0("Top_150_DEGs_by_absLog2FC_noTies_",Sys.Date(),".csv"), row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(all.drug.degs,paste0("DEGs_unfiltered_",Sys.Date(),".csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

### compile results
```{r compile results, echo=FALSE}
dmea.path <- file.path(getwd(), "DMEA_Cmap_L1000")
setwd(dmea.path)
all.drug.degs <- read.csv(paste0("Top_150_DEGs_by_absLog2FC_noTies_","2025-01-29",".csv"))
timepoints <- na.omit(unique(all.drug.degs$Time))
cmap.outputs <- list()
outputs <- list()
inputs <- list()

for (i in timepoints) {
  cmap.results <- list()
  moa.results <- list()
  drug.list <- list()
  for (j in na.omit(unique(all.drug.degs$DrugTreatment))) {
    fname <- paste0("Query_results/",as.character(i),"h_",j,"_Cmap_L1000_Query.tar.gz")
    if (file.exists(fname)) {
      ## get Cmap MOA results
      cat(file=stderr(), "About to load", fname, "\n")
      dir.info <- archive::archive_extract(fname)
      dir.name <- dir.info[1]
      fname2 <- "gsea/TAG/arfs/NORM_CS/gsea_result.gct" # this points to Cmap MOA results
      fname3 <- paste0(dir.name, fname2)
      rank.data <- read.delim(file=archive::archive_extract(fname, files=fname3), skip = 2)
      rank.data <- rank.data[rank.data$cell_iname=="-666" & rank.data$pert_type=="TRT_CP" &
                               (rank.data$set_type=="PCL" | rank.data$set_type=="MOA_CLASS"),]
      cmap.results[[j]] <- rank.data[,c("id","raw_cs","norm_cs","fdr_q_nlog10")]
      
      ## get drug ranks
      # load file
      fname2 <- "arfs/TAG/query_result.gct" # this points to Cmap MOA results
      fname3 <- paste0(dir.name, fname2)
      rank.data <- read.delim(file=archive::archive_extract(fname, files=fname3), skip = 2)
      
      # filter drug list
      cat(file=stderr(), "About to filter input", "\n")
      rank.data <- rank.data[rank.data$qc_pass==1,]
      rank.data <- rank.data[rank.data$pert_iname!="na",] # removes empty first row in CMap query output
      rank.data <- rank.data[rank.data$moa!="-666",] # remove drugs without known moa (moa="-666")
      rank.data[,ncol(rank.data)] <- as.numeric(rank.data[,ncol(rank.data)]) # assuming rank metric is last column
      rank.data <- rank.data[rank.data[,ncol(rank.data)]!=0,]
      rank.metric <- colnames(rank.data)[ncol(rank.data)] # store name of rank metric to restore later
      
      # average rank metric
      cat(file=stderr(), "About to average rank metric", "\n")
      rank.data$FDR_q_value <- 10^(-as.numeric(rank.data$fdr_q_nlog10))
      rank.data <- plyr::ddply(rank.data, .(pert_iname, moa), summarize, norm_cs = mean(as.numeric(norm_cs), na.rm=TRUE),
                               FDR_q_value = ifelse(length(na.omit(FDR_q_value))==1,na.omit(FDR_q_value), 
                                                           as.numeric(metap::sumlog(na.omit(FDR_q_value))$p))) #average across cell lines
      rank.data$fdr_q_nlog10 <- -log(rank.data$FDR_q_value, 10)
      drug.list[[j]] <- dplyr::distinct(na.omit(rank.data[!duplicated(rank.data[,c("pert_iname")]),]))
      rank.data <- dplyr::distinct(na.omit(rank.data[!duplicated(rank.data[,c("pert_iname")]), c("pert_iname", "norm_cs", "moa")]))

      # run DMEA
      cat(file=stderr(), "About to run enrichment analysis", "\n")
      DMEA.output <- panSEA::drugSEA_ties(rank.data, drug="pert_iname", rank.metric="norm_cs",
                                          FDR=0.25, min.per.set=6, ties=FALSE)
      moa.results[[j]] <- DMEA.output$result
    }
  }  
  cmap.outputs[[as.character(i)]] <- data.table::rbindlist(cmap.results, use.names = TRUE, idcol="DrugTreatment")
  outputs[[as.character(i)]] <- data.table::rbindlist(moa.results, use.names = TRUE, idcol="DrugTreatment")
  inputs[[as.character(i)]] <- data.table::rbindlist(drug.list, use.names = TRUE, idcol="DrugTreatment")
}
cmap.dmea.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(cmap.outputs, use.names = TRUE, idcol = "Time")
drug.corr.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(inputs, use.names = TRUE, idcol="Time")
dmea.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(outputs, use.names = TRUE, idcol = "Time")
write.csv(cmap.dmea.sens.df, "Cmap_L1000_moaRanks.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(drug.corr.sens.df, "Cmap_L1000_drugRanks.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(dmea.sens.df, "DMEA_Cmap_L1000.csv", row.names = FALSE)
dmea.files <- list("Cmap_L1000_drugRanks.csv" = drug.corr.sens.df,
                   "Cmap_L1000_moaRanks.csv" = cmap.dmea.sens.df,
                   "DMEA_Cmap_L1000.csv" = dmea.sens.df)
synapse_id <- "syn64693139"
synapser::synLogin()
save_to_synapse_v2(dmea.files, synapse_id)
```




### plot number of correlated drugs, enriched MOAs
```{r plot # of results, echo = FALSE}
## drug mechanisms
# prep data
library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2);library(patchwork)
setwd(dmea.path)
#dmea.sens.df <- read.csv("DMEA_results.csv")
#drug.corr.sens.df <- read.csv("DMEA_correlations.csv")
sig.dmea <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$FDR_q_value <= 0.25 & 
                           dmea.sens.df$p_value <= 0.05,]
nMOAs <- plyr::ddply(sig.dmea, .(MPNST, DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug_set))))
nMOAs.overall <- plyr::ddply(sig.dmea, .(DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug_set))))

# are there more/less enriched drug MOAs at 8h vs. 24h? No: p-value = 0.7988
for (m in mpnst) {
 cat(m, "# of MOAs enriched at 8h vs. 24h\n")
  t.test(nMOAs[nMOAs$MPNST==m & nMOAs$Time=="8h",]$N, 
         nMOAs[nMOAs$MPNST==m & nMOAs$Time=="24h",]$N) 
}
cat("Overall", "# of MOAs enriched at 8h vs. 24h\n")
t.test(nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="8h",]$N, 
       nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="24h",]$N)

nMOAs$moa <- NA
nMOAs.overall$moa <- NA
for (i in 1:length(drug.info)) {
  if (any(nMOAs$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]])) {
   nMOAs[nMOAs$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i] 
   nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i]
  }
}

# generate plot
nMOAs$moa <- factor(nMOAs$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nMOAs$moa))))
nMOA.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(nMOAs, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Enriched Drug Mechanisms",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + 
  theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal") + facet_wrap(~MPNST)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_enrichedDrugMechanisms.pdf", nMOA.plot, width=5.5, height=4)

nMOAs.overall$moa <- factor(nMOAs.overall$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nMOAs.overall$moa))))
nMOA.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(nMOAs.overall, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Enriched Drug Mechanisms",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_enrichedDrugMechanisms_overall.pdf", nMOA.plot.overall, width=5.5, height=4)

## drugs
# prep data
sig.drug.corr <- drug.corr.sens.df[drug.corr.sens.df$Pearson.q <= 0.05,]
nDrugs <- plyr::ddply(sig.drug.corr, .(MPNST, DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug))))
nDrugs.overall <- plyr::ddply(sig.drug.corr, .(DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug))))

# are there more/less correlated drugs at 8h vs. 24h? No: p-value = 0.5048
for (m in mpnst) {
 cat(m, "# of drugs correlated at 8h vs. 24h\n")
  t.test(nDrugs[nDrugs$MPNST==m & nDrugs$Time=="8h",]$N, 
         nDrugs[nDrugs$MPNST==m & nDrugs$Time=="24h",]$N) 
}
cat("Overall", "# of drugs correlated at 8h vs. 24h\n")
t.test(nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$Time=="8h",]$N, 
       nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$Time=="24h",]$N)

nDrugs$moa <- NA
nDrugs.overall$moa <- NA
for (i in 1:length(drug.info)) {
  if (any(nDrugs$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]])) {
   nDrugs[nDrugs$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i] 
   nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i]
  }
}

# generate plot
#nDrugs$Time <- factor(nDrugs$Time, levels=timepoints)
nDrugs$moa <- factor(nDrugs$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nDrugs$moa))))
nDrug.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(nDrugs, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") + labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="Log(# of Correlated Drugs)",
                                           color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal") + facet_wrap(~MPNST)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_correlatedDrugs.pdf", nDrug.plot, width=5.5, height=4)

#nDrugs.overall$Time <- factor(nDrugs.overall$Time, levels=timepoints)
nDrugs.overall$moa <- factor(nDrugs.overall$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nDrugs.overall$moa))))
nDrug.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(nDrugs, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") + labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="Log(# of Correlated Drugs)",
                                           color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_correlatedDrugs_overall.pdf", nDrug.plot.overall, width=5.5, height=4)

patchN.plot <- nMOA.plot + nDrug.plot + patchwork::plot_layout(guides="collect") #& theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs.pdf", patchN.plot, width=8, height=4)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs_taller.pdf", patchN.plot, width=8, height=8)

patchN.plot.overall <- nMOA.plot.overall + nDrug.plot.overall + patchwork::plot_layout(guides="collect") #& theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs_overall.pdf", patchN.plot.overall, width=8, height=4)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs_overall_taller.pdf", patchN.plot.overall, width=8, height=10)
```
